examples: The expression of thymidylate synthase may be one of the important prognostic indicator for endometrial carcinoma.

Nitric oxide synthase activity may also result in the subsequent activation of guanylyl cyclase and PKG.
TAK-475 blocked squalene synthase, another liver chemical further down in the chain of biochemical reactions the statins shut off.
So a squalene synthase inhibitor should make a statin more powerful.
